macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Nasdaq Enters Correction as U.S. Stock Indices Fall Over 7%
items.summary: Major U.S. stock indices have entered a correction phase, with the Nasdaq declining over 7% as the market experiences a difficult period according to Yahoo Finance.

items.title: S&P 500, Dow Jones, and Nasdaq Post Significant Declines
items.summary: The S&P 500 dropped 1.74% to 6,477.16, the Dow Jones fell 469 points, and the Nasdaq Composite slid 2.38%, marking one of the weakest stretches in recent months.

items.title: Quarter-End Market Reassessment: Rising Oil Prices Intensify Inflation Concerns
items.summary: As investors wrap up Q1, major U.S. stock indices are in correction territory while rising oil and gas prices have intensified pressure on inflation expectations and bond yields, shifting focus from rate cuts to higher energy costs and monetary policy uncertainty.

items.title: Magnificent Seven Stocks Decline, Underperform S&P 500 in 2026
items.summary: All seven stocks in the Magnificent Seven group have declined in value this year and have underperformed the broader S&P 500 index.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Ethereum Drops Below $2,000 Mark with 1.48% Decline
items.summary: Ethereum fell 1.48% in a single trading session on March 29, 2026, breaking below the key psychological $2,000 level amid mounting selling pressure and broader risk-off sentiment. The decline coincides with ETF outflows and macroeconomic uncertainties.

items.title: Bitcoin Surges Past 67,000 USDT with 1.36% Gain in 24 Hours
items.summary: Bitcoin crossed the 67,000 USDT benchmark early on March 29, 2026, trading at 67,052 USDT after a 1.36% increase, signaling renewed bullish momentum despite recent ETF outflows.

items.title: US Spot Bitcoin ETFs See $296M Weekly Net Outflows
items.summary: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded net outflows of approximately $296 million for the week ending March 27, 2026, including $171.3 million on March 26 and $225.5 million on March 27, reflecting thinning patience amid risk asset pressures.

items.title: Kraken's xStocks to Power Nasdaq Tokenized Equities
items.summary: Kraken's xStocks platform will enable Nasdaq's tokenized equities, marking a significant advancement in blockchain-based financial infrastructure as highlighted in the latest CF Benchmarks newsletter.

items.title: Pepeto Crosses $8.47M Milestone Amid Bitcoin $200K Targets
items.summary: Pepeto surpassed $8.47 million in the last 24 hours, while analysts eye Bitcoin reaching $200K and reports emerge of Trump family $12B profits indicating insider movements.

items.title: Crypto Market Shifts Toward Selective Altcoin Recovery and Tokenization
items.summary: As of March 29, 2026, the market focuses on structural changes with Bitcoin as the foundation, selective altcoin gains in payments and scalable blockchains, and rising roles for stablecoins and tokenization.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Google Releases Suite of Gemini-Powered Developer Tools
items.summary: Google announced multiple Gemini 3.1 integrations including building smart financial assistants with LlamaParse, Jump to Play with MediaPipe, and agent skills to close knowledge gaps. DeepMind's Gemini API developer skill boosts agent performance to 96.6% task success.[2]
items.source: Midnight Signal AI / Google Developers Blog

items.title: DeepMind Introduces Gemini API Developer Skill for AI Agents
items.summary: DeepMind launched the Gemini API developer skill, providing agents access to live documentation and SDK guidance, resulting in up to 96.6% task success rates.[2]
items.source: Midnight Signal AI / Google Developers Blog

items.title: Women's Participation in Tech and AI Rises to 32% in 2026
items.summary: Women now comprise 32% of the tech workforce, up from 29% last year, with 31% participation in emerging technologies including AI; however, they hold only 14-19% of senior AI roles.[5]

items.title: AI's Power Profile Emphasizes Speed, Scale, Consistency Beyond Just Speed
items.summary: March 2026 analysis highlights AI's advantages in computational speed, large-scale pattern recognition, consistency, and integration, enabling hybrid human-AI systems in data-rich domains.[1]

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Riot Games Reportedly Developing Open-World RPG in League of Legends Universe
items.summary: Riot Games is working on an open-world RPG set in the League of Legends universe, as part of industry updates. The project is mentioned alongside other developments like PUBG's 2026 anti-cheat plans.

items.title: Crimson Desert Reaches 3 Million Sales, Boosting Pearl Abyss Stock
items.summary: Pearl Abyss experiences a stock rebound after Crimson Desert achieves 3 million sales. This marks a significant milestone for the game.

items.title: PUBG Battlegrounds Outlines 2026 Anti-Cheat Improvements
items.summary: PUBG Battlegrounds shares plans for 2026 anti-cheat enhancements, focusing on better detection accuracy, fewer false bans, and measures against repeat offenders.

items.title: Shadowverse Prepares to Shut Down After 10 Years
items.summary: Shadowverse is set to close after a decade of service, as announced in recent gaming updates.

items.title: No Major Game Releases on March 29, Next on March 30
items.summary: No games are releasing on March 29, with Truck Mechanic: Dangerous Paths scheduled for March 30 on Steam. Upcoming releases for March 29-31 were detailed in recent news.

items.title: Garena Free Fire Max Redeem Codes Released for March 29
items.summary: New 12-character alphanumeric redeem codes for Garena Free Fire Max are available, allowing players to unlock free in-game rewards.

items.title: Updates Coming to RuneScape Dragonwilds and Genshin Impact
items.summary: RuneScape Dragonwilds and Genshin Impact are receiving updates, as part of the latest gaming news roundup.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Tech companies leaning hard into the US defense industry
items.summary: Major tech giants including Palantir, Anthropic, and Anduril are joining traditional defense contractors like Lockheed Martin and Boeing in supporting US military operations. Anduril announced a $20 billion, 10-year contract with the US military for defense systems against Iranian drones.

items.title: Apple celebrates 50th anniversary while confronting AI challenge
items.summary: Apple marks its 50-year milestone as the company faces pressure to deliver another culture-changing innovation through artificial intelligence. The company, now valued at over $3.6 trillion, must prove it can maintain its legacy of technological breakthroughs.

items.title: Iran conflict reveals digital warfare tactics including hospital hacking and spyware
items.summary: Security researchers have tracked nearly 5,800 cyberattacks from approximately 50 Iranian-linked groups, including spyware distribution via fake bomb shelter apps and attacks on medical technology companies. Iran is also targeting data centers with both cyber and conventional weapons.
